title: Enable team sign-up with three open slots

requirements.text: Open the sign-up form on the Sign-Up page so players can submit their information. The page currently shows 'No Positions Left' / 'Registration Closed' — replace this with a functional sign-up form that allows submissions as long as slots remain available.

quotes: Make it so you can sign up for the team. Three slots open.

acceptanceCriteria: The Sign-Up page renders a form (name, position, experience level at minimum) instead of the 'No Positions Left' locked state.
The form can be submitted by any visitor (anonymous or authenticated).
Successful submission shows a confirmation message.

requirements.text: Set the total team sign-up capacity to exactly 3 open slots. Once 3 sign-ups have been submitted, the form should lock and display a 'Team Full' or 'No Slots Remaining' message. The backend must enforce this 3-slot limit and reject submissions that exceed it.
acceptanceCriteria: Only 3 sign-up submissions are accepted in total before the form is locked.
The backend returns an error when a 4th submission is attempted.
The frontend displays remaining slot count (e.g., '2 slots remaining') and updates it after each submission.
When all 3 slots are filled, the form is replaced with a 'Team Full' notice.

constraints: Do not remove or alter the 'We Won the Gold Ball! 🏆' hero banner.
Preserve the existing navy/gold design theme.
All Motoko logic must remain in the single main actor (backend/main.mo).
nonGoals: Per-position capacity tracking (requirement is a single shared pool of 3 total slots).
